performance.slogan: Real user performance monitoring for faster websites.

fast.title: Find slow pages before users leave
fast.desc:
Website speed affects traffic, conversions, and user trust. Alongside <indexUrl>traffic analytics</indexUrl>, Swetrix measures website performance from real user visits, so you can see which pages load slowly.
Use real interaction data to spot load-time issues before they cost you visitors.

items.a:
Standard plans are best if you need privacy-first analytics, funnels, error tracking, bot filtering, email reports and API access. Plus plans include everything in Standard and add session replays, feature flags, A/B testing, higher API rate limits, more websites, more team members and priority support.

Once you've picked a plan type, choose the event volume based on your traffic. You can start with the {{lowestPlanEventsAmount}} events per month plan. If you already have some traffic, you can start with the {{moderatePlanEventsAmount}} events per month plan.

In any case, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan anytime, and we will pro-rate your subscription if you change your plan so it would be fair for you.

items.q: What happens if I exceed my plan's limit?
items.a:
We won't stop counting your data if you exceed your plan's limit. However, you will need to upgrade to a higher plan to keep access to your stats.

We will send you an email notification if you exceed or come close to your plan's limit. We also won't restrict your dashboard if you get an occasional traffic spike or go over your limit slightly.

items.q: Does Swetrix offer a free plan?
items.a:
For our cloud version, we don't offer a free plan at this moment. We're an independent startup funded solely by our subscribers. We don't monetise or sell your data, so subscription fee is needed to cover our costs and keep the service running.

At the same time, Swetrix is open-source and we provide a Community Edition that you can self-host on your own infrastructure for free.
Yep, you can try Swetrix for free for {{freeTrialDays}} days! A payment method is required to start your trial, but you won't be charged until it ends and you can cancel anytime.

An event is a pageview, a custom event or an error event that the tracking script sends to Swetrix. Pageviews and error events are tracked automatically based on your tracking script set up, and custom events are sent manually based on the user actions and your configuration.

Swetrix is a privacy-focused web analytics tool. We do not use cookies for tracking, and all the data is collected anonymously. We don't use persistent, cross-device tracking, and don't use your data for any other purposes. You can read more about it in our <dataPolicyUrl>data policy</dataPolicyUrl>.

Yes, you can access access your statistics or website data using our API. And you can also send pageviews or events for your websites using our API. Learn more about it in our <apiDocumentationUrl>API documentation</apiDocumentationUrl>.

items.q: Can I invite my team members to Swetrix?
items.a:
Yes! You can create an organisation and invite your team members to it, assign them roles and easily manage their access to the organisation and its projects.

You can invite people directly to your projects, create password-protected access links or make your projects public and accessible to everyone.
We provide email support and you can <contactUsUrl>contact us</contactUsUrl> at any time. We also offer a community support on our <discordUrl>Discord server</discordUrl>.

items.q: I want to ask something else...
items.a: Sure, feel free to <contactUsUrl>contact us</contactUsUrl> at any time.

gaItems.q: Is Swetrix a Google Analytics (GA4) replacement?
gaItems.a: Swetrix covers the core web analytics most teams need, plus extras like performance monitoring and error tracking - without turning your users into ad profiles.

gaItems.q: Will my site run faster than with GA?
gaItems.a: Swetrix is designed to be lightweight. Less script weight and fewer third-party calls can mean a faster site, especially on slow connections.

agencyItems.q: Can I manage multiple client sites from one account?
agencyItems.a: Yes. Group client sites into organisations, invite your team, and switch between dashboards without logging out. The Plus plan covers up to 100 websites, and Enterprise removes the limit entirely.

agencyItems.q: Can I white-label dashboards and reports for clients?
agencyItems.a: You can share live public or password-protected dashboards, embed them in your own client portal via iframe, and schedule automated email reports - so clients see their data in your context, not a generic GA export.

agencyItems.q: How does billing work for an agency with many clients?
agencyItems.a: Everything runs on a single agency subscription with one invoice. Pick an event volume that covers your whole roster and scale it up as clients grow - there are no per-seat fees and team members are unlimited.

agencyItems.q: Is Swetrix GDPR-compliant for my EU clients?
agencyItems.a: Yes. Swetrix is cookieless and collects no personal data, so most client sites can skip the cookie banner. Data is processed in the EU and we can sign a DPA for clients who require one.

whySwitch.heading: Why people switch from Google Analytics to Swetrix

whySwitch.body:
Google Analytics has become too complex. Finding basic metrics now requires navigating endless menus, and its reliance on cookies forces you to use annoying consent banners - costing you up to 40% of your traffic data when users decline.

Swetrix gives you a clean, real-time dashboard with no learning curve. We don't use cookies, so you don't need cookie banners, you own 100% of your data, and your website stays fast.

common.checkLeakedPasswordDesc: When enabled we check your password with the <db>{{database}}</db> database. We don't send your password to the service. First we hash your password (using SHA1) and send only the first 5 characters of that hash to the service. The service returns all leaked passwords that start with those 5 characters. At our end we check if one of these matches with your password. We show you a warning if it has been leaked before. We never store your password in plain text.

pricing.title: Pricing

comparison.metaDescription: Compare Swetrix plans feature by feature. Every plan includes the full privacy-first analytics suite — higher tiers add session replays, experiments, and enterprise controls.
comparison.title: Compare plans & features

tooltips.websites: These counts are included by default — Swetrix has no hard limit, so you can purchase more websites as add-ons whenever you need them.
tooltips.cookieless: Swetrix is fully cookieless by default. When you have your users' consent, you can also identify visitors using cookies or your own identifiers.
tooltips.publicDashboards: Share any dashboard with a public link, or password-protect it for clients and stakeholders.
tooltips.userFlow: Visualise how visitors move between pages and where they drop off across their journey.
tooltips.segments: Save reusable dashboard filters and custom metric views for cohorts, campaigns, devices, regions, or any slice you check often.
tooltips.askAi: Ask questions about your analytics in natural language and get answers with charts, tables, anomaly callouts, and links back into the dashboard.
tooltips.seo: Track search queries, rankings, top pages, branded traffic, and AI-assistant (GEO) referrals, powered by your Google Search Console integration.
tooltips.revenue: Attribute revenue to visitors and campaigns via Stripe, Paddle, or the API — with AOV, MRR, and refunds right inside your analytics dashboard.
tooltips.alerts: Get notified the moment a metric crosses a threshold — via email, Telegram, Discord, Slack, webhook, or browser push.
tooltips.openSource: Swetrix is fully open-source and self-hostable — audit the code or run it on your own infrastructure.
tooltips.twoFactor: Protect your account with TOTP-based two-factor authentication.

pricing.adv: Try Swetrix on your website for 14 days - completely free of charge. A payment method is required, but you can cancel anytime before the trial ends.
pricing.legacyDescription: This plan or pricing is no longer available for new users. It is still available for existing users.
pricing.monthlyEventsTooltip: Events include pageviews, custom events, CAPTCHA completions, and error events.

plus.name: Plus
plus.description: For teams, agencies, and data-heavy work.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: Custom infrastructure, limits, support, and legal terms.

benefits.dedicatedAccountManager: Dedicated account manager for ongoing support

tooltips.advancedBotDetection: Swetrix filters automated traffic before it is stored, from known bot user agents and headless browsers to stricter checks for suspicious headers, probe paths, referrer spam, and datacenter IPs. Blocked bot requests never count toward your event quota.
tooltips.adBlockerBypass: Route the tracker script and analytics traffic through a managed reverse proxy on your own subdomain, so requests are served first-party from your domain.
tooltips.googleAnalyticsImport: Bring historical analytics into Swetrix from Google Analytics, Plausible, Fathom, Umami, Simple Analytics, and other platforms so your old reports stay available after switching.
tooltips.eventsAndGoals: Track custom events and conversion goals, including pageview goals, event goals, and multi-condition goals based on traffic, campaign, device, or metadata filters.
tooltips.performanceMonitoring: Track real-user site speed metrics such as page load timing, TTFB, DNS, TLS, render time, and backend or frontend delays.
tooltips.funnels: Track ordered page and event steps, measure conversion and dropoff, and inspect sessions for each step.
tooltips.sessionUserProfileAnalysis: Inspect individual profiles and sessions to understand journeys, debug issues, and review pageviews, events, errors, and replays when available.
tooltips.errorTracking: Capture client-side exceptions, stack traces, affected users, sessions, and breakdowns alongside your analytics.
tooltips.emailReports: Receive regular email summaries with key project metrics such as visitors, pageviews, session duration, bounce rate, goals, errors, and top countries.
tooltips.recaptchaAlternative: Use Swetrix CAPTCHA, an open-source, cookieless Proof of Work challenge that blocks bots without image puzzles.
tooltips.restfulApiSdks: Send pageviews and custom events through the tracking script, integrations, SDKs, or the Events API for server-side and native app tracking.

sessionReplays.description: A session replay is a recorded browser session that you can play back to debug user journeys, errors, and drop-offs.
sessionReplays.recording: Replays are recorded only after you explicitly start recording through the tracker. Regular analytics events and pageviews do not create replays automatically.
sessionReplays.quota: Quota is based on recorded replays, also shown as recorded sessions, per month. It is not based on replay minutes, storage size, or how many times a replay is watched.
sessionReplays.plans: Standard includes 0 replays, Plus includes a monthly quota proportional to the selected event tier, and Enterprise is custom.

tooltips.featureFlags: Roll features out gradually, target cohorts or individual users, and turn changes off without another deploy.
tooltips.abTesting: Run experiments against goals, split visitors across variants, and compare conversion results before shipping a change to everyone.
tooltips.twentyXHigherApiRateLimits: Standard plans include 300 API requests per hour. Plus plans include 6,000 API requests per hour, which is 20x higher.
tooltips.plusWebsites: Swetrix has no limit on the number of websites you can add. You can purchase more websites via add-ons. Bulk discounts are available if you contact support.
tooltips.customEventLimits: Enterprise plans are flexible for event limits, API rate limits, and project quantity.
tooltips.onPremise: Our team installs Swetrix in your own infrastructure and manages the installation, maintenance, and updates for you.
tooltips.dedicatedInstance: We deploy Swetrix in your preferred location, such as the EU, US, or Asia, manage updates, and keep it separate from the shared Swetrix Cloud environment.
tooltips.manualInvoicing: We accept all major credit & debit cards. Enterprise customers can also pay by ACH, SEPA, wire transfer, or invoice.

pricing.downgradeTitle: Are you sure you want to downgrade?
pricing.downgradeDesc:
After downgrading, your plan will include fewer projects and available events per month. In case your website contains more traffic than the plan you want to downgrade to includes, this will result in not all events being stored in our database.
You will be able to return to your current plan at any time.
If you have any questions, you can always email us at {{email}}.
pricing.cancelTitle: Are you sure you want to cancel your subscription?
pricing.cancelDesc:
After cancelling your subscription, no new events will be collected by Swetrix for your projects.
You will be able to return to your current plan at any time.
If you have any questions, you can always email us at {{email}}.
